name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Firewall Stopped
notes: This building block detects Windows firewall stopped.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Firewall Stopped on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001031) Success Audit: A Windows Firewall setting has changed
when the event matches LOWER("Attribute New Value") LIKE 'no' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Firewall Stopped on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001031) Success Audit: A Windows Firewall setting has changed
AND when the event matches LOWER("Attribute New Value") LIKE 'no' AQL filter query
